subject: Reasoning & Mental Ability
note: Practice feed me correct answer nahi hota; jaha ID important-questions se match kiya waha answer bhara hai (answer_source dekho).

questions.question_text: If A to the south of B and C is to the east of B, in what direction is A with respect to C?
A, B, C, and D are playing cards. A and B are partners. D faces towards North. If A faces towards the west, then who faces towards the south?

Sobha was facing East. She walked 20 metres. Turning left she moved 15 metres and then turning right moved 25 metres. Finally, she turned right and moved 15 metres more. How far is she from her starting point?

Jatin leaves his house and walks 12 km towards North. He turns right and walks another 12 km. He turns right again, walks 12 km more, and turns left to walk 5 km. How far is he from his home and in which direction?
Divya journeys 10 km to the east then 10 km to the south-west. He turns again and journeys 10 km to North-West. Which direction is he in from the starting point?
If South-West becomes North, then what will West become?
Veena is facing North-East. She turns 90o in the clockwise direction and then 135o in the anticlockwise direction. Which direction is she facing now?
A man is facing North-West. He turns 90o in the clockwise direction and then 135o in the anticlockwise direction. Which direction is he facing now?
Neeta started walking straight facing West. After walking some distance she took a left turn and again after walking some distance she took a left turn. Which direction is she facing now?

Shobhit started walking straight facing East. After walking a distance of 20 metres, he took a right turn. Again walking 10 metres, he took a left turn, and again after walking 10 metres, he took a left turn. Which direction is he facing now?
A man is facing West. He turns 45o in the clockwise direction and then another 180o in the same direction and then 270o in the anticlockwise direction. Which direction is he facing now?
Anshuman is facing South. He turns 135o in the anticlockwise direction and then 180o in the clockwise direction. Which direction is he facing now?

M started walking straight towards South. He walked a distance of 15 metres and then took a left turn and walked a distance of 30 metres. Then he took a right turn and walked a distance of 15 metres again. M is facing which direction finally?
Abhishek walked 20 metres towards West, took a right turn and walked 30 metres. Again, he took a right turn and walked 20 metres. Towards which direction was he facing?
If South-East becomes North, North-East becomes West and so on. What will East become?
A man is facing North-East. He turns 90o in the clockwise direction and then 135o in the anticlockwise direction. Which direction is he facing now?
You go towards North, turn right, then right again and then go to the left. In which direction are you going now?
Amit walked 30 metres towards East, took a right turn and walked 40 metres. Then he took a left turn and walked 30 metres. In which direction is he now from the starting point?
B is in the East of A and North of C. If M is in the South of C, then in which direction of B is M?
Deepak is performing yoga with his head down and legs up. His face is towards the South. In which direction will his left hand be?

A man walks 30 metres towards South. Then, turning to his right, he walks 30 metres. Again, turning to his left, he walks 20 metres. Finally, he turns to his left and walks 30 metres. How far is he from his initial position?

Mohit left for his office in his car. He drove 12 km towards North and then 10 km towards West. He then turned to the South and covered 4 km. Further, he turned to the East and moved 8 km. Finally, he turned right and drove 8 km. How far and in which direction is he from his starting point?
Pravin walked 30 metres towards East, took a right turn and walked 20 metres, again took a right turn and walked 30 metres. How far is he from his starting point?

Vansh walks 20 metres towards North. He then turns left and walks 40 metres. He again turns left and walks 20 metres. Further, he moves 20 metres after turning to the right. How far is he from his original position?
Shalu is facing towards South-West and turns through 45o clockwise, 135o anticlockwise and 45o anticlockwise again. In which direction is she facing now?

Sonali drove her car 20 km Northwards. Then she turned left and drove for 30 km. She then turned left again and drove yet another 20 km. Again she turned left and drove her car 45 km. How far she will be now from the initial position?

Vansh and Puneet started walking from two different positions A and B respectively. Vansh walks 3 km North and turns to East and walks 4 km and again turns to North and walks 2 km and finally turns to East and walks 4 km to reach point 'C'. Similarly, Puneet walks 3 km North and turns to West and walks 4 km and finally turns to North, walks 2 km and meet Vansh at point 'C. What was the distance between Vansh and Puneet's starting positions?
A watch reads 9:25. If the minute hand is in the North direction, then hour hand will be in ________ direction.
Shivam is facing towards North-East. He turns 180o clockwise and then again turns 180o anticlockwise. Finally he turns 315o clockwise. In which direction is he facing now?
Tarun is facing South-West. He turns 135o anti-clockwise and then again turns 225o clockwise. Finally he turns 270o anti-clockwise. In which direction is he facing now?

Shanaya left for her office in her car. She drove 6 km towards North and then 12 km towards West. She then turned to the South and covered 1 km. Further, she turned to the East and moved 8 km. Finally, she turned right and drove 5 km. How far and in which direction is she now from her starting point?
Ashwini is facing towards South-West. He turns 180o clockwise and then turns 90o anticlockwise. Finally he turns 315o clockwise. In which direction is he facing now?
Umang walks 20 m towards South. Then he turned left and walks 30 m. Again, he turned left and walks 20 m. Then he turned right and walks 15 m. How far is he now from his initial position?

Vinita walked 20 m towards North. Then, she turned right and walks 30 m. Then, she turns right and walks 35 m. Then, she turns left and walks 15 m. Finally, she turns left and walks 15 m. How far and in which direction is she now with respect to her starting point?
Suhani is facing towards South-West. She turns 225o anticlockwise and then 315o clockwise. Which direction is she facing now?

A cat runs 20 m towards East, turns right and runs 10 m. She then turns right and runs 9 m. She again turns left and runs 5 m and then turns left and runs 12 m. Finally, she turns left and runs 6 m. Now which direction is the cat facing?
You go towards North, turn right, then right again and then go to the left. In which direction are you facing now?

From his house, Kabir went 15 km to the North. Then he turned West and covered 10 km. Then, he turned South and covered 5 km. Finally turning to East, he covered 10 km. In which direction is he from his house?

Village W is 20 km to the North of village X. Village Y is 18 km to the East of village X. Village Z is 12 km to the West of village W. If Manu starts from village Y and goes to village Z via village X and W, then in which direction is he from his starting point?
If X is to the South of Y and Z is to the East of Y, then in what direction is X with respect to Z?
If South-East becomes North, North becomes South-West and so on, then what will NorthWest become?
The time on the watch is quarter to three. If the minute hand points to North-East, in which direction does the hour hand point?
Abhishek puts his timepiece on the table in such a way that at 6 p.m., hour hand points to North. In which direction the minute hand will point at 9.15 p.m.?

Ajay left home and cycled 10 km towards South, then turned right and cycled 5 km and then again turned right and cycled 10 km. After this he turned left and cycled 10 km. How many kilometres will he have to cycle to reach his home straight?
A man is facing towards West and turns through 45o clockwise, again 180° clockwise and then turns through 270o anticlockwise. In which direction is he facing now?
A man is facing North-West. He turns 90o in the clockwise direction, then 180o in anti-clockwise direction and then another 90o in the anti-clockwise direction. Which direction is he facing now?
A is 40 m South-West of B. C is 40 m South-East of B. Then, C is in which direction with respect to A?

A mountaineer starts from Camp A and proceeds East to Camp B which is 4 km away. From Camp B he proceeds to Camp C, 5 km to the South. From there, he returns and proceeds 12 km to Camp D via Camps B and A. How far is he away from Camp A?

Mohit starting from a fixed point goes 15 m towards North and then after turning to his right he goes 15 m. Then he goes 10, 15 and 15 metres after turning to his right each time. How far is he from his starting point?
Some boys are sitting in three rows all facing North such that S is in the middle row. P is just to the right of S. Q is just behind of P while R is in the North of S. In which direction of R is Q?

Kunal faces towards North. Turning to his right, he walks 25 metres. He then turns to his left and walks 30 metres. Next, he move 25 metres to his right. He then turns to his right again and walks 55 metres. Finally, he turns to the right and moves 40 metres. In which direction is he now from his starting point?

A boy first goes in South direction, then he turns towards left and travels for some distance. After that he turns right and moves certain distance. At last he turns left and travels again for some distance. Now, in which direction is he moving?

Sneha walked 20 m towards North. Then she turned right and walked 30 m. Then she turned right and walked 35 m. Then she turned left and walked 15 m. Finally, she turned left and walked 15 m. In which direction is she from the starting point?

Riya walks 15 m towards West. She turned left and walks 20 m. She then turned left and walked 15 m. After this she turned to her right and walks 12 m. How far and in which direction is she now from the starting point?

After walking 3 km, Madhu turned right and covered a distance of 4 km, then turned towards left and covered a distance of 1 km. At the end, she was moving towards North. In which direction, did she start the journey?

A man walks 4 km to the East and then turns to the South and walks 5 km. Again he turns to the East and walks 4 km. Next, he turns northwards and walks 11 km. How far is he now from his starting point?
P is 600 km eastward of O and Q is 800 km north of O. R is exactly in the middle of Q and P. The distance between Q and R is
Kirti walks 10 km towards North. From there, she walks 6 km towards South. Then, she walks 3 km towards East. How far and in which direction is she now with respect to her starting point?
Ali walks 10 km towards North. He turns to his right and after walking 2 km, he turns to his left. Finally, after walking 6 km, he turns to his left again. In which direction is he moving now?
Sukul walks 5 km from her school. Then she turns to her right and after walking 3 km, again she turns to her right and walks 1 km to reach her home. How far is she now from her school?

Kritika faces towards West. Turning to her left, she walks 30 metres. She then turns to her right and walks 25 metres. Next, she moves 30 metres to her right. Finally, she turns to the left and moves 20 metres. How far and in which direction is she now from her starting point?

Ritika faces towards South. Turning to her right, she walks 20 metres. She then turns to her left and walks 35 metres. Next, she walks 25 metres to her right. She then turns to her right again and walks 55 metres. Finally, she turns to the right and walks 25 metres. In which direction is she now from her starting point?

Abhinav started walking straight towards South. He walked a distance of 10 metres and then took a right turn and walked a distance of 20 metres. He again took a right turn and walked a distance of 45 metres. In which direction is he now from his starting point?

Ashina walked 30 m towards North. Then she turned right and walked 30 m. Again she turned right and walked 55 m. Then she turned left and walked 20 m. Finally, she turned left and walked 25 m. In which direction is she now from her starting point?

Ashwini is in the South-West of Sushmita, Alka is to the East of Ashwini and South-East of Sushmita. Prerna is to the North of Alka in a line with Ashwini and Sushmita. In which direction Prerna is located with respect to Sushmita?

Sonal walked 8 metres towards East, took a right turn and walked 12 metres and again took a left turn and walked 5 metres and stopped. In which direction is she now with respect to her starting point?
Pranav walks 20 m towards East. Then he turns left and walks 9 m. Then he again turns left and walks 32 m. In which direction and how far is he now from his starting position?

Anamika walks 6 km towards North. Then she turns to West and walks 10 km. After this, she turns to North and walks 9 km. Again she turns towards West and walks 10 km. How far is she now from her starting point?

Samay travels 12 km towards West, turns right and travels 5 km and then turns left and travels another 3 km and then again turns left and travels another 5 km. How far and in which direction is he now from his starting point?
Aakash walks 30 m North. Then he turns right and walks 60 m. Again, he turns right and walks 45 m. How far and in which direction is he now from his initial position?

Arpita left her home and walked 10 m towards South. She then turned right and walked 5 m and again after turning to her right, she walked 10 m. She then turned left and walked 10 m. How far does she now from her home?

Facing North, Niharika walks 20 m, then she turns left and walks 30 m, then again she turns left and walks 20 m. Then, she turns right and walks 10 m. How far and in which direction is she now from her starting position?
Mayank went 50 m South from his house, then turned left and went 20 m, then turning to North he went 30 m. In which direction is his home with respect to the final point?

At my farmhouse, I am facing East, then I turn left and walk 10 metres. I again turn right and walk 5 metres. Again, I go 5 metres towards the South and from there walk 5 metres towards the West. In which direction am I from my farm house?
If B is to the South-West of A, C is to the East of B and also South-East of A, D is to the North of C in line with BA, then in which direction of A is D located?
Manvi moved a distance of 90 metres towards the North. She then turned to her left and walked 40 metres. She turned left again and walked 100 metres. Finally, in which direction was she moving?

A traveller starts from a point A and travels 3 km eastwards to B and then turns left and travels thrice that distance to reach C. He again turns left and travels five times the distance he covered between A and B and reaches his destination D. The shortest distance between A and D is

I am facing South. I turn right and walk 20 m. Then I turn right and walk 10 m. Then I turn left and walk 10 m and then turning right walk 20 m. Then I turn right again and walk 60 m. In which direction am I from the starting point?

Four persons stationed at the four corners of a square piece as shown in the diagram. B starts crossing the field diagonally. After walking half the distance, he turns right, walks some distance and turns left. Which direction is B facing now?

A villager went to meet his uncle in another village situated 5 km away in the North-East direction of his own village. From there he came to meet his brother-in-law living in a village situated 4 km in the South of his uncle's village. How far away and in which direction is he now from his own village?
In the given figure, P is 400 km eastward of O and Q is 300 km northward of O. R is exactly in the middle of Q and P. Find the distance between R and P.
Gaurav walks 2 km towards North. He then turns left and walks 6 km. He again turns left and walks 2 km. Further, he moves 3 km after turning to the right. How far is he from his original position?

Aarush walks 1 km towards East and then he turns to North and walks 4 km. Again he turns to East and walks 3 km. After this he turns to South and walks 7 km. Now, how far is he from his starting point?
Going 50 m to the South of her house, Kavita turns left and goes another 20 m. Then, turning to the North, she goes 30 m and then starts walking to her house. In which direction is she walking now?
Jai walks 10 m towards East and then 10 m to his right. Then every time turning to his left, he walks 5,16 and 23 m respectively. How far is he now from his starting point?

Malti walked 12 metres towards West, then turns to her right and walked 8 metres and then turns to her left and walked 6 metres. Finally she turns around and walked 12 m straight. What is the shortest distance (in metres) between her starting point and the present position?

Radha moves towards South-East a distance of 8 m, then she moves towards West and travels a distance of 12 m. From here, she moves towards North-West a distance of 8 m and finally she moves a distance of 4 m towards East and stands at that point. How far is the starting point from where she stood?
X started to walk straight towards South. After walking 5 m he turned to the left and walked 3 m. After this he turned to the right and walked 5 m. Now to which direction X is facing?

Vikas walked 10 metres towards North, took a left turn and walked 15 metres, and again took a left turn and walked 10 metres and stopped walking. Towards which direction was he facing when he stopped walking?
Sonali walks 20 m North. Then she turns right and walks 30 m. Then she again turns right and walks 35 m. In which direction and how many metres away is she from her original position?

Starting from a point P, Aryan walked 40 metres towards North. He turned right and walked 60 metres. He then turned right and walked 40 metres. At last he turned right and walked 40 metres and reached a point Q. How far and in which direction is he now from the starting point?

Aman walked 25 m towards East. Then he turned to his right and walked 20 m and again he turned to his right and walked 25 m. Then, he turned to his left and walked 10 m. How far and in which direction is he from the starting point?
